titles.title: While He Was On The Cross

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's no one great amongst us, We're nothing on our own, We make mistakes, and often slip, Just common flesh and bone; But someday, I'll prove just why I say, I'm of a special kind, For while He was on the Cross I was on His mind.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For, He knew me, Yet, He loved me, ` He whose glory makes the heavens shine. I am so unworthy of such mercy, Yet, while He was on the Cross I was on His mind.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The look of love was on His face, The thorns were on His head, Blood was on His scarlet robe, Stained in crimson red; Though His eye was on the crowd that day He looked ahead in time, And while He was on the cross I was on His mind.
